notes: Supplier-specific adapter (adapters/skydental.ts). Single sitemap.xml with ~7,600 product URLs; schema.org Product JSON-LD on product pages. Verified live 2026-06-11: 48/50 sample rows extracted.

Supplier-specific adapter (adapters/shasta.ts) plus catalog crawl (shasta-catalog-discovery.ts); no sitemap. Cap crawl with --max-shasta-catalog-pages. Verified live 2026-06-11: 40/40 sample rows extracted.
